articles.title: West Nile Virus found in mosquito test sample in Jamaica Plain
articles.description:
Officials advise residents to take precautions, though the risk of transmission is low.

The post West Nile Virus found in mosquito test sample in Jamaica Plain appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: West Nile Virus detected in a mosquito sample in Jamaica Plain.
Officials report low transmission risk; residents advised to take precautions.
Health officials recommend using insect repellent and eliminating standing water.

articles.title: Boston man accused of making homemade explosives, threats on MBTA Commuter Rail
articles.description:
A witness reported the man making threats said he was inspired by the Jan. 6, 2021, attacks at the U.S. Capitol.

The post Boston man accused of making homemade explosives, threats on MBTA Commuter Rail appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston man arrested for making homemade explosives and threatening MBTA Commuter Rail services.
Witness reported threats inspired by the January 6, 2021 Capitol attacks.
Increased security measures expected on MBTA following this incident.

articles.title: Lawsuit: ICE detained East Boston father despite legal status
articles.description:
Jose Pineda, 62, a Salvadoran immigrant who has legal status in the U.S., spent two days in a Burlington ICE facility under “cruel and inhumane conditions,” his attorneys say.

The post Lawsuit: ICE detained East Boston father despite legal status appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jose Pineda, 62, was detained by ICE for two days despite having legal status.
Attorneys claim he faced cruel and inhumane conditions during his detention.
The lawsuit raises concerns about ICE practices affecting legal residents in East Boston.
